verdict_reasoning: SRC is canonically myristoylated to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane and localized to mitochondria/nucleus in normal cells. However, it undergoes documented cancer-cell-specific, autophagolysosomal-exocytosis-mediated translocation to the outer cell surface in multiple tumor types. This represents clear cell_state_induced ecto-display: the protein reaches the outer leaflet only in cancer cells, not healthy tissues. Surface-accessible cancer-associated Src is validated as a therapeutic target (anti-Src antibodies, ADCs, bispecifics, radioligands).
